creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Perform following repocopies:

mbone/rat -> audio/rat
mbone/rat30 -> audio/rat30
mbone/speak_freely -> audio/speak_freely
mbone/vat -> audio/vat
mbone/xspeakfree -> audio/xspeakfree

mbone/vic -> multimedia/vic

mbone/imm -> net/imm
mbone/mcl -> net/mcl
mbone/rqm -> net/rqm
mbone/rtptools -> net/rtptools
mbone/sdr -> net/sdr
mbone/udpcast -> net/udpcast
mbone/wb -> net/wb
